# Env Domain

Gherkin specs for rhino-cli environment management commands.

| File                  | Command       | Scenarios |
| --------------------- | ------------- | --------- |
| `env-backup.feature`  | `env backup`  | 18        |
| `env-init.feature`    | `env init`    | 4         |
| `env-restore.feature` | `env restore` | 13        |
